hero.description: Regulated marketplace for tokenized real-world assets. Vineyards, land, real estate and infrastructure from USD 500.

steps.lead: Scroll to walk through the process. Each step activates as you go.

01.title: Create your account
01.body: Digital KYC with investor profile and jurisdiction. Verification in minutes — no paperwork, no branches.

02.title: Pick a project
02.body: Curated marketplace: vineyards, land, real estate, livestock. Every listing publishes prospectus, trust deed and fees upfront.

03.title: Invest from USD 500
03.body: Pay in Argentine pesos (local on-ramp) or USD/USDC. You receive Polygon tokens representing your stake in the trust.

04.title: Follow your asset live
04.body: Valuation, distributions and quarterly reports. Exit via secondary market (when enabled) or trust maturity.

projects.leadDesktop: Hover a panel to explore it. The card expands in place.
projects.leadMobile: Tap a project to see more details.

cafayate.name: Cafayate Vineyards I
cafayate.description: Financial trust with public offering over 500 hectares of virgin land with a certified aquifer in the Calchaquí Valleys, at 1,660 m above sea level. Value is created through 36 months of asset transformation (irrigation, roads, lot division, young vineyards) and appreciation of premium wine-growing soil. Operating sponsor: Bodega Lavaque.
bullets: 500 ha · 450 ha for sale + 50 ha sponsor reserve
Tranches: Early Adopters USD 5,000/ha → R2 USD 6,500 → R3 USD 8,450 · projected exit USD 11,000/ha
Minimum ticket USD 500 (equivalent to 0.1 ha) in the Early Adopters tranche
Certified aquifer · 340 days of sun · terroir globally recognized for high-altitude Torrontés and Malbec
Stack: Polygon · ERC-7943 · Trustee: CNV-regulated broker-dealer · VASP: AMG Capital Group S.A.
cafayate.timeline: Early Adopters tranche open · 36-month horizon · Projected exit year 3
cafayate.emitter: Cafayate Vineyards I · Financial trust (CNV-regulated trustee)
cafayate.mediaAlt: Cafayate Vineyards I — RWA project in the Calchaquí Valleys, Salta

gallery.alt: View of the land in Cafayate, Salta
gallery.caption: 500 ha · 1,660 m elevation

alto-agrelo.name: Alto Agrelo Estates
alto-agrelo.description: Productive real estate development in Alto Agrelo, Luján de Cuyo — Argentina's wine heartland. Combines productive parcels with high-value crops (walnuts, pistachios, lavender, vineyards), rural residences with Airbnb potential and professional management. Each parcel operates as a self-contained economic unit.
bullets: Developer's full package: USD 345,000 (land + planting + home) — reference, not the tokenized ticket
Selected crops: walnuts and pistachios (10-year cycle), lavender (4–5 years), premium vineyards
Self-sufficient model: primary production covers annual maintenance costs
Cash flow from year 1 via tourism rentals · operational breakeven in year 11
Premium location: 25 min from Mendoza, 40 min from the airport, views of the Andes
Tokenization structure being defined with a top-tier CNV-regulated trustee
alto-agrelo.timeline: Under structuring · Ankora listing coming soon
alto-agrelo.emitter: Alto Agrelo Estates · Financial trust to be structured (CNV-regulated trustee)
alto-agrelo.mediaAlt: Alto Agrelo Estates — productive real estate development in Luján de Cuyo, Mendoza

gallery.alt: View of the Alto Agrelo valley
gallery.caption: Luján de Cuyo · Land of Malbec

cantini.name: Cantini Estates
cantini.description: Multi-layer ecosystem integrating vineyard ownership (25 ha · 250,000 m²), annual fine-wine production and real experiences — hospitality, collectible bottles, access to Oria Club in Mendoza, Tuscany and Punta del Este. "From soil to glass, from vine to villa." Proposal being adapted to the CNV RG 1069/2025 regime.
bullets: 25 hectares of vineyard tokenized as fractional units (m² with on-chain traceability)
Tier system — Mosaic · Quadro · Altura · Terroir Landlord — with scalable physical benefits
Real rewards: boutique hotel stays, tastings, spa, blending sessions, Oria Club access
Annual yield in bottle equivalents: NFTs redeemable for physical wine from each vintage
Proposed digital platform: 3D map, dashboard, terroir traceability, optional governance
Ongoing adaptation to financial trust under CNV with a regulated trustee
cantini.timeline: Proposal under review · Ankora integration TBD
cantini.emitter: Cantini Estates · Financial trust to be structured
cantini.mediaAlt: Cantini Estates — fine-wine ecosystem in Alto Agrelo, Mendoza

caravan-tech.name: Caravan Tech
caravan-tech.description: Tokenization of live cattle using proprietary technology: GPS ear tags, rumen bolus sensors, DNA storage and satellite remote sensing. Each token corresponds to a real animal, auditable end-to-end, with pricing automatically adjusted by breed, health, legal traceability and development stage. 8+ years of mature technology, ICAR-certified.
bullets: Proprietary hardware: solar ear tag with GPS every 15 min · rumen bolus · 10+ year DNA storage · remote sensing
Dynamic pricing smart contract: Legal · Breed · Rearing · Health · Development Stage × CME Live Cattle
Projected investor return: ~14% annual (technical whitepaper)
EUDR compliance — cattle verifiable as deforestation-free
Patents filed in the USA, Brazil and major producing markets
Adaptation to CNV-regulated financial trust underway — legal wrapper for Ankora
caravan-tech.timeline: Under structuring · Ankora listing coming soon
caravan-tech.emitter: Caravan Tech · Financial trust to be structured
caravan-tech.mediaAlt: Caravan Tech — livestock tokenization with proprietary technology infrastructure

structure.lead: Every marketplace asset is issued as a financial trust with a public offering supervised by Argentina's CNV. Separate roles — operator, trustee, technology, legal — each with its own responsibility.

operator.name: AMG Capital Group S.A.
operator.detail: Registered with CNV as a Virtual Asset Service Provider — DI-2024-50276668. Operates the marketplace and holds token custody.

trustee.name: Financial trustee
trustee.detail: Top-tier CNV-regulated broker-dealer. Administers the financial trusts that are the legal vehicle of each issuance and places the tokens.

tech.name: Tokenization platform
tech.detail: Blockchain platform with native compliance hooks — KYC, transfer restrictions and on-chain auditability.

regulatory.name: CNV RG 1069/2025
regulatory.detail: Argentina's real-world asset tokenization regime (with RG 1081 and 1087 amendments). Official sandbox.

fiat.name: Mecaenpol S.R.L.
fiat.detail: PSPCP registered with BCRA. On-ramp in Argentine pesos.

holding.name: Grupo Blex
holding.detail: AMG Capital Group and Mecaenpol are part of the group.

narrative: Real wealth was reserved for centuries for those who already had it. Buying a farm, an estate, a vineyard required capital most people would never have.
Meanwhile, money loses value in pesos. And the crypto world, for all its promise, became a casino where the assets don't exist outside a screen.
There's another path. Bring real wealth into the digital world. Make it divisible, buyable, sellable. Without losing what makes it real.
about.purposeBody: Make real, physical wealth accessible, liquid and transferable for anyone — not just for those who already own it.
about.promiseBody: Own a fraction of something real. Collect rent. Sell whenever you want.

real.label: Real
real.tagline: If you can't see, touch or visit it, it doesn't make the cut.
real.body: Zero synthetic assets. Zero derivatives. Every token has a hectare, a square meter, a harvest behind it.

anclado.label: Anchored
anclado.tagline: Yield comes from the physical world.
anclado.body: No staking, no farming. It comes from a producing vineyard, a rented property, an energy asset.

regulado.label: Regulated
regulado.tagline: Regulation is part of the product.
regulado.body: We operate under CNV RG 1069/1081/1087 because regulation is a promise to the investor, not an obstacle.

accesible.label: Accessible
accesible.body: We don't compete with platforms selling USD 5 tokens. Entry-level accessibility, premium selection.

global.label: Global
global.tagline: An investor in Miami, as easily as one in Buenos Aires.
global.body: Argentine pesos, dollars, international wires from day one. The historical FX friction ends here.

faq.lead: No empty promises: we explain how liquidity works, what happens when things go wrong, and the legal framework we operate under.

salida.question: How do I exit an investment before maturity?
salida.answer: Once the secondary market is live you'll be able to list your tokens for sale inside the platform. Until then, the natural exit is the maturity of each project's trust (schedule published on each listing). Enabling the secondary market depends on regulatory milestones and the final contract with the tokenization stack.

sponsor-quiebra.question: What happens if the project sponsor goes bankrupt?
sponsor-quiebra.answer: The underlying asset (land, real estate, livestock) sits in a financial trust administered by a top-tier CNV-regulated trustee — a patrimony separate from the sponsor. If the sponsor goes bankrupt, the trust doesn't fall with it: the asset stays in the trust's name and is liquidated under contract, returning tokenholders their proportional share. It's the same logic that protects institutional investors in global funds.

fees.question: What are the fees?
fees.answer: Every project publishes its fees upfront: issuance fee (one-time), trust administration fee (annual, typically 1-2%), and secondary-market fee once it's enabled. Nothing hidden. Ankora's brand DNA: total fee transparency on every listing.

jurisdiccion.question: What jurisdictions can I invest from?
jurisdiccion.answer: Onboarding includes a jurisdiction and investor profile check. Today we operate with Argentine and LATAM investors; the plan covers cross-border access for the US and Europe. Each project listing indicates the jurisdictions enabled for that specific issuance.

fideicomiso.question: What is a financial trust and why does it matter?
fideicomiso.answer: It's the legal vehicle (Argentine Law 24,441 + Civil Code 1666-1676) that separates the asset's patrimony from the sponsor's. It has a public offering registered with CNV under the RG 1069/2025 regime. Each token you buy represents a proportional stake in that trust. It's the same legal architecture institutional global funds use.

polygon.question: Why Polygon and what is ERC-7943?
polygon.answer: We use a regulated tokenization platform that issues tokens on Polygon (Ethereum L2, low fees, fast settlement) with the ERC-7943 standard — specifically designed for RWA with compliance hooks (KYC, transfer restrictions, whitelists) compatible with regulated financial trusts.

clima.question: What happens if weather ruins a harvest or there's an operational issue?
clima.answer: Every project publishes its specific risks and the matching coverage (weather insurance, forward contracts, construction coverage). Projected returns are estimates, not guarantees. Any investment in real-world assets carries the risk of partial or total loss of capital — we say it without sugarcoating.

transfer.question: Can I transfer my token to another wallet?
transfer.answer: Yes, but only to wallets verified with the same compliance profile (approved KYC, enabled jurisdiction). It's a restriction of the ERC-7943 standard to meet the CNV regime. It's not an open public crypto wallet; it's a regulated infrastructure.

cta.description: Ankora is in demo phase: transactional operations will go live once the regulatory stack is fully activated. Leave us your email and we'll let you know when the first pilot tranche opens.

footer.description: Regulated marketplace for real-asset tokenization. Operated by AMG Capital Group S.A., registered with Argentina's CNV as a Virtual Asset Service Provider under regime RG 1069/2025. Trustee: CNV-regulated broker-dealer.
footer.riskBody: Any investment in real-world assets carries the risk of partial or total loss of invested capital. Projected returns are estimates based on market comparables and do not constitute a guarantee of future performance. Ankora is in demo phase — transactional operations will go live once the regulatory stack is fully activated. We do not provide personalized financial advice; consult your advisor before investing.
